mapper.select: SELECT id, type, license_plate, status, weight_kg, volume_m3 FROM vehicles WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, type, license_plate, status, weight_kg, volume_m3 FROM vehicles
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vehicles (id, type, license_plate, status, weight_kg, volume_m3) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=OTHER}, #{type}, #{licensePlate}, #{status}, #{maxWeightKg}, #{maxVolumeM3})
mapper.update: UPDATE vehicles SET license_plate = #{licensePlate}, type = #{type}, weight_kg = #{maxWeightKg}, volume_m3 = #{maxVolumeM3}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=OTHER}
